data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Strengthens user authentication processes across platforms to mitigate unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Supports authentication apps, SMS, and biometric options.

data.title: Real-time Threat Monitoring
data.description: Constantly monitors for potential security threats or breaches to swiftly respond.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates AI-driven security analytics using Microsoft Sentinel.

data.title: Data Encapsulation and Encryption
data.description: Ensures that user and service data are encrypted both at rest and in transit.
data.technical_spec: Advanced Encryption Standard (AES) for data at rest, TLS for data in transit.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts systematic reviews to identify vulnerabilities within its systems.
data.technical_spec: Third-party vulnerability assessments and penetration testing.

data.title: Advanced Firewall Configurations
data.description: Prevents unauthorized intrusions and ensures safe and secure access.
data.technical_spec: Combines hardware and software firewalls with intrusion prevention systems (IPS).
